name: Friendship Orange Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add eggs, Friendship starter, milk, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt). Mix until just combined.
4. Fold in grated orange peel, raisins, and chopped pecans.
5. Fill prepared muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from pans and allow to cool slightly.
8. Make topping by combining juice of 1 orange and 1/2 cup sugar in a small saucepan. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly until sugar has dissolved.
9. Drizzle topping over cooled cupcakes.
Makes 12-14 servings.
